phrases.translation: fourteen letters
The fourteen ball has a green stripe.
phrases.roman: Shísì hào qiú yǒu lǜsè tiáowén.

phrases.translation: number fourteen
The older sister is holding her younger sister.

phrases.text: 爸妈都出去的时候，姐姐照看我们。
phrases.translation: Our older sister babysits when our parents are out.
phrases.roman: Bàmā dōu chūqù de shíhou, jiějie zhàokàn wǒmen.
phrases.trad: 爸媽都出去的時候，姐姐照看我們。

phrases.translation: have an older sister
The rooster is crowing.

phrases.text: 公鸡叫的时候，我会醒来。
phrases.translation: When the rooster crows, I will wake up.
phrases.roman: Gōngjī jiào de shíhou, wǒ huì xǐnglái.
phrases.trad: 公雞叫的時候，我會醒來。

phrases.translation: The rooster crows while it glances around.
phrases.roman: Gōngjī biān jiào biān sìchù zhāngwàng.

phrases.text: 每天早上我都被这只老公鸡叫醒。
phrases.translation: I was woken every morning by the old rooster.
phrases.roman: Měitiān zǎoshang wǒ dōu bèi zhè zhī lǎogōngjī jiào xǐng.
phrases.trad: 每天早上我都被這只老公雞叫醒。

phrases.translation: crowing rooster
good morning rooster

phrases.text: 叉子、勺子和餐刀都是餐具。
phrases.translation: Forks, spoons, and knives are eating utensils.
phrases.roman: Chāzi , sháozi hé cān dāo dōu shì cānjù .
phrases.trad: 叉子、勺子和餐刀都是餐具。

phrases.translation: The soup spoon is much larger than the dinner spoon.
phrases.roman: Tāngchí bǐ cānsháo dà duō le.

phrases.translation: It is necessary to use a spoon when eating soup.
phrases.roman: Hē tāng de shíhou yào yòng tiáogēng.

phrases.text: 冲剂，汤匙和一个小塑料杯
phrases.translation: liquid medicine, a spoon and a small plastic cup
phrases.roman: chōngjì, tāngchí hé yī gè xiǎo sùliào bēi
phrases.trad: 沖劑，湯匙和一個小塑料杯

phrases.translation: silver spoon
soup spoon
The high school students study at the library.

phrases.text: 高中生正在图书馆学习。
phrases.translation: The high school students are studying at the library.
phrases.trad: 高中生正在圖書館學習。

phrases.text: 高中生们在图书馆学习过了。
phrases.translation: The high school students studied in the library.
phrases.roman: Gāozhōngshēng men zài túshūguǎn xuéxí guò le .
phrases.trad: 高中生們在圖書館學習過了。

phrases.text: 我每天在学校学习，然后晚上再学三个小时。
phrases.translation: I study every day at school, and for three hours each night.
phrases.roman: Wǒ měitiān zài xuéxiào xuéxí, ránhòu wǎnshàng zài xué sān gè xiǎoshí.
phrases.trad: 我每天在學校學習，然後晚上再學三個小時。

phrases.translation: study at a library
study law
study together

phrases.text: 我们的法语老师在家说法语。
phrases.translation: Our French teacher speaks the language at home.
phrases.roman: Wǒmen de Fǎyǔ lǎoshī zài jiā shuō Fǎyǔ.
phrases.trad: 我們的法語老師在家說法語。

phrases.text: 史密斯先生是我高中最喜欢的老师。
phrases.translation: Mr. Smith was my favorite high school teacher.
phrases.roman: Shǐmìsī xiānsheng shì wǒ gāozhōng zuì xǐhuān de lǎoshī.
phrases.trad: 史密斯先生是我高中最喜歡的老師。

phrases.text: 这名老师正在教室里教孩子们。
phrases.translation: The teacher is teaching the kids in the classroom.
phrases.roman: Zhè míng lǎoshī zhèngzài jiàoshì lǐ jiāo háizimen.
phrases.trad: 這名老師正在教室裏教孩子們。

phrases.translation: English teacher
favorite teacher
